The Neuron

Good morning! Here's what's happening in AI today.

Anthropic launches Claude Fable 5

Anthropic released Claude Fable 5 today, its most capable model yet, claiming state-of-the-art results on long-horizon agentic benchmarks. The model runs multi-hour autonomous coding sessions and is priced at $10 per million input tokens. Enterprises get a 1M-token context window by default. Read more

Meta's new open weights

Meta open-sourced a 30B-parameter multimodal model that runs on a single consumer GPU, targeting on-device assistants. Early benchmarks put it within 5% of much larger closed models. Details here

Tool of the day

PromptPolish — a Chrome extension that rewrites your prompts. Sponsored.

Unsubscribe | Manage your subscription
